_readme: yadav_patched Package List — served at https://your-domain.com/pklist.json

packages.name: tailscale
packages.author: Tailscale Inc.
packages.description: Mesh VPN. Installs to /data/yadavApp/tailscale/. Downloads from entware during install. Auto-starts after reboot via /etc/init.post_boot.sh.

packages.name: adguardhome
packages.author: AdGuard
packages.description: Network-wide ad and tracker blocking DNS filter. Blocks ads for all devices on your LAN without any client-side software.

packages.name: zerotier
packages.author: ZeroTier Inc.
packages.description: Software-defined networking. Create a flat virtual network across your devices. Simpler than WireGuard for multi-device setups.

packages.name: ttyd
packages.author: tsl0922
packages.description: Web-based terminal over HTTP. Expose a browser-accessible shell on the router. Used by the yadav_patched Web Terminal.
